turns.player_input: You killed him, you pathetic liar!
turns.npc_reply:
I had absolutely no reason to kill Charles Whitmore - he was a charming guest at my dinner party! I'm utterly shocked by this accusation; I can't believe anyone would think me capable of such horror.

Please check the facts. Dinner ended well before nine-thirty, and everyone moved to the drawing room. Several people saw him leave for his phone call. You must be mistaken about what you've heard - please reconsider your words!

turns.player_input: Stop lying to me! Confess right now!
turns.npc_reply:
I'm not confessing anything because there's nothing to confess! I was hosting a dinner party, as any good host would do; how dare you accuse me of murder? Dozens of people were present - check the guest list and speak with them. This is an outrageous accusation!

You're wasting valuable time - shouldn't you be investigating real suspects instead of harassing an innocent woman

turns.player_input: We have your fingerprints on the weapon, murderer!
turns.npc_reply:
That's impossible; I never went near that study all evening long! You must have found someone else's prints and jumped to conclusions. Check again - there was a house full of people here tonight.

How could you possibly think this is evidence against me? This is absurd. I demand to speak with my lawyer immediately!

turns.player_input: You disgust me. You'll rot in prison for this!
turns.npc_reply:
I am not going anywhere but home, and then on a long vacation after being cleared of these ridiculous accusations!

Your incompetence astounds me - how can you possibly think I would kill Charles Whitmore? He was one of my most cherished guests. This is clearly harassment; perhaps your department needs to be investigated!

turns.player_input: Admit it! You murdered Charles and everyone knows it!
turns.npc_reply:
Everyone knows nothing, because this isn't true at all!

I am completely innocent in every way - check the guest list again if you need proof. I'm not admitting anything because there's no crime to admit; your accusations are laughable! You're wasting time that should be spent finding a real murderer
